title: Easy Shopping® Wood Handel Round Pointed Digging Shovel, Gardening, Digging, Builders Shovel, D-Grip Strong handle Light Weight
features: Our shovel is equipped with a FULL SIZE DOUBLE INJECTED D-GRIP Wood Handel, designed to provide unmatched strength and reliability. The handle includes a soft grip for enhanced comfort, ensuring reduced hand fatigue during prolonged use.

The blade is manufactured from heat-treated carbon steel, making it exceptionally strong and durable. This heavy-duty blade is built to withstand the toughest digging tasks, maintaining its sharpness and effectiveness over time.

The shovel boasts an overall height of 104 cm, offering ample leverage for efficient digging. The blade width of 21 cm and weight 1.5kg, provides a perfect balance between digging capacity and manoeuvrability, making it ideal for various applications.

Whether you are an avid metal detectorist, a gardener, or a professional landscaper, the Round Pointed Head Digging Shovel is designed to meet your needs with precision and ease. Invest in this reliable and efficient tool to make your digging tasks simpler and more enjoyable.
This full-size shovel is meticulously designed to offer superior performance and exceptional durability.

Safety Warning Always wear appropriate safety gear, including gloves and eye protection, when using this shovel. Be aware of your surroundings to avoid injury and keep a safe distance from others. Handle the tool with care to prevent accidents. Always store the shovel in a safe and secure location when not in use.
